_about: Hand overrides for the 2026 reworks. track_pick forces the exact 2026 tracklist item AND forces the row to link the specific 2026 release (not the pre-2000 master it shares) for rows whose Discogs release carries the original's master_id (#1,#5,#9,#14) or is a multi-track split (#4 Cubik). video_pick pins the official 2026 upload (oembed-validated) for every row, because most of these pages carry only vintage videos of the ORIGINAL. row_note names the pre-2000 source and links it.

track_pick.5: Brighter Days (Harry Romero House Me Up Extended Remix)

video_note.4: Technikal's hard-trance remake (B-side of the 'Fusion / Cubik' 12"); official 'Cubik (Extended Mix)' upload
video_note.7: Janice Robinson — the original Livin' Joy voice — re-records it herself; official Armada visualiser
video_note.12: 'Toca's Miracle' fuses Fragma's 'Toca Me' (1999) with Coco's 'I Need A Miracle' (1997) hook

row_note.1: Richie Hawtin reimagines the definitive synth-pop 12" as stripped minimal techno. **Reworks** [New Order – Blue Monday](https://www.discogs.com/release/20755) (Factory, 1983).
row_note.2: Filtered house flip built on the Chaka Khan hook. **Reworks** [Rufus & Chaka Khan – Ain't Nobody](https://www.discogs.com/release/191075) (Warner Bros., 1983).
row_note.3: Rave-hardstyle remake, built for the Defqon.1 mainstage. **Reworks** [Age Of Love – The Age Of Love](https://www.discogs.com/release/41526) (DiKi, 1990).
row_note.4: Hard-trance remake of the bleep-techno monster. **Reworks** [808 State – Cubik](https://www.discogs.com/release/14270) (ZTT / Tommy Boy, 1990).
row_note.5: Harry Romero re-rubs the Cajual vocal-house anthem. **Reworks** [Cajmere Featuring Dajae – Brighter Days](https://www.discogs.com/release/15192) (Cajual, 1992).
row_note.6: Hard-house cover of the AATW rave anthem. **Reworks** [N-Trance – Set You Free](https://www.discogs.com/release/376112) (All Around The World, 1992).
row_note.8: Hard-trance cover of the piano-trance classic. **Reworks** [Robert Miles – Children](https://www.discogs.com/release/12221) (DBX / Deconstruction, 1995).
row_note.9: Chicane revisits his own Balearic landmark with Larse. **Reworks** [Chicane – Offshore](https://www.discogs.com/release/17074) (Xtravaganza / Modena, 1996).
row_note.10: Rawstyle cover keeping Gala's vocal. **Reworks** [Gala – Freed From Desire](https://www.discogs.com/release/149619) (Do It Yourself, 1996).
row_note.11: Tech-house rework of the Moloko favourite, on Nervous. **Reworks** [Moloko – Sing It Back](https://www.discogs.com/release/29603266) (Echo, 1998).
row_note.13: UK hardcore cover of the Eurotrance monster. **Reworks** [DJ Jurgen Presents Alice Deejay – Better Off Alone](https://www.discogs.com/release/22692) (Positiva, 1999).
row_note.14: Topic & Marco Generani rework Fatboy Slim's big-beat anthem. **Reworks** [Fatboy Slim – Right Here, Right Now](https://www.discogs.com/release/19213) (Skint, 1999).
